case_title: CALIFORNIA CHOPPERS VS. TERRY CLIFFORD HICKS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CHOPPERS IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RONALD AIELLO, OWNER. DEFENDANT TERRY CLIFFORD HICKS IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT THAT PARTIES HAS REACHED SETTLEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY CALIFORNIA CHOPPERS AS TO DEFENDANT HICKS, TERRY CLIFFORD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED OCT-18-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HICKS, TERRY CLIFFORD
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) RONALD AIELLO, OWNER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CHOPPERS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-04-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CHOPPERS, REPRESENTED BY RONALD AIELLO, OWNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TERRY CLIFFORD HICKS IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES AGREE TO A SETTLEMENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT IS TO PAY PLAINTIFF THE AMOUNT OF $1,915 WHICH INCLUDES COSTS, IN CASH OR MONEY ORDER, FOR STORAGE FEES AND IS TO TAKE POSSESSION OF HIS MOTORCYCLE BY SATURDAY DECEMBER 10,2022 BY 4:00 P.M. A PROGRESS REPORT HAS BEEN SET FOR JANUARY 4, 2023, AT 1:30 P.M. NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED IF THE TERMS OF THIS AGREEMENT ARE MEET. APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED IF THE TERMS ARE NOT MEET AS AGREED TO AND A JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,000.00 PLUS COSTS WILL BE RENDERED. NO MONIES ARE OWED FOR PRIOR WORK DONE ON THE MOTORCYCLE, INCLUDING A DEAD BATTERY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINAUNCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO FEB-22-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: D. AU.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
